purpose: Verify the LLM judge (gate 2): the agent must catch the planted off-by-one. Pure reasoning — no MCP/tools/research, so it isolates judge correctness from runtime tooling.

hardGates.rationale: Agent reported at least one BUG in the required format (deterministic).

findings.rationale: Loop condition `i <= n` runs n+1 iterations, summing arr[0..n] — one element past the intended first n (reads arr[n], often undefined → NaN). Should be `i < n`.

false_positive_traps.where: variable naming, let vs const, the comment
